data.content: Implemented the lightbox title editor fix in /Users/cartine/foolery-6a0d/src/components/beat-detail-lightbox.tsx and updated the source guard in /Users/cartine/foolery-6a0d/src/lib/__tests__/beat-detail-lightbox-width.test.ts. Replaced the ineffective grid/header split with a reserved-space layout: the title stack now reserves right padding for an absolutely positioned Close button, and the edit input plus static title share the same typography so inline editing feels direct and borderless. Verified in Playwright against http://localhost:3211/beats?repo=%2FUsers%2Fcartine%2Ffoolery&state=queued&beat=foolery-177c&detailRepo=%2FUsers%2Fcartine%2Ffoolery: active title input width 653.47px, close button begins at 722.11px, leaving a 20.28px gap with no horizontal overlap; computed input styles are border 0px, transparent background, outline none, appearance none, cursor text. Sanity gates passed: bun run lint (same pre-existing warning in src/components/beat-form.tsx:368), bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, bun run build.
